headline: SCE Offers Nearly $700 Million in Relief for Community Members Impacted by Eaton Fire
summary: ROSEMEAD, Calif., June 18, 2026--Southern California Edison today announced continued progress in supporting community recovery following the Eaton Fire, with nearly $700 million offered to community members through its Wildfire Recovery Compensation Program. To date, more than 2,000 offers have been extended to over 4,900 claimants.

headline: Cummins CEO joins 3M board of directors
summary: The OEM executive was also appointed to the board’s science, technology and sustainability committee.
